svg.title: Splunk Enterprise Deployment Lab Architecture v3
svg.desc: Lab with CM server.conf including pass4SymmKey, indexers with server.conf showing manager_uri and replication port 9887, all-in-one LM/DS/MC with serverclass.conf, and 2 Linux UFs with deploymentclient.conf

g.text: License master · Deployment server · Monitoring console

svg.text: pass4SymmKey must match on CM and all indexers for cluster auth
